title: Huawei AP371 - WiFi7 indoor Dual Band AP, smart antenna, USB, BLE
description: Experience the future of wireless connectivity with the Huawei AP371 access point. This top-of-the-line access point, designed for unparalleled speed and performance, supports the new WiFi 7 wireless standard with modulation speed of 689 Mbps + 2.88 Gbps! The Huawei AP371 harnesses the power of WiFi 7 technology to achieve maximum speeds and ultra-low latency , ensuring a smooth and immersive user experience even for the most demanding applications. With support for the latest WiFi 7 standard, this access point offers unmatched throughput and capacity, making it ideal for high-density environments such as stadiums, convention centers, and campuses. Featuring advanced functionalities like OFDMA and MU-MIMO , the AP371 optimizes wireless… Enterprise Wireless Networks: The Huawei AP371 provides robust wireless connectivity for large enterprises, ensuring seamless high-speed internet access across multiple floors and buildings, and supports a large number of simultaneous users with advanced MU-MIMO technology Public Wi-Fi Hotspots: Ideal for public spaces such as airports, stadiums, and shopping malls, the Huawei AP371 offers reliable and secure Wi-Fi coverage, enabling hundreds of users to connect simultaneously without compromising performance Educational Institutions: Schools and universities benefit from the Huawei AP371 by providing high-speed wireless internet access to students and staff across the entire campus Healthcare Facilities: Hospitals and clinics utilize the Huawei AP371 to maintain continuous, secure wireless connections for medical devices, patient…
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ac - wave2, 802.11ax, 802.11be MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2880 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 688 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 23 Security WPA3 AES 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Antenna gain [dBi] 4, 5 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 100/1000/2500Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes USB Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at Max. power consumption [W] 13,5 Power via connector/terminal 12V DC Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 50 Weight [g] 470 Width [mm] 180 Height [mm] 35 Depth [mm] 180 Software Operating mode Access Point Features Leader AP
